_comment: mode=verify (DISARMED 2026-07-17, owner merge-strategy pivot). The blind auto-promote (rebase our branch onto the WHOLE new upstream release + auto-ship on green) is the 'grab-and-paste' merge the owner is retiring. New doctrine: per-commit relevance assessment + reproduce-the-bug-in-our-version before applying OUR own fix — a careful SELECTIVE merge, not a wholesale rebase. Until that selective-merge flow is built, verify only detects new releases + proves a rebase builds green in scratch (ships NOTHING). The promote_all path is retained for reference but auto-ship stays retired pending the new selective design.
